column1: Disease Prediction System using Machine Learning

column2: many people ignore early symptoms of diseases due to lack of awareness or medical access. Delayed diagnosis can lead to serious health complications. Therefore
column3: there is a need for an intelligent system that can assist in early detection of diseases based on basic health parameters.

column1: This project aims to develop a **Disease Prediction System** using Machine Learning that analyzes user inputs such as age
column4: and other symptoms to predict the likelihood of a disease. The system will help users understand potential health risks and encourage timely medical consultation.

column1: * To build a machine learning model that predicts disease risk
* To provide quick and easy predictions for users
* To understand the application of ML in healthcare
The dataset used in this project consists of patient health records with the following features:
* Or collected from publicly available healthcare datasets
* Converting categorical data into numerical form
This project uses a **Decision Tree Classifier**
column2: which is a supervised learning algorithm.

column1: * Works well with both numerical and categorical data
* Data passed through trained ML model
* Predict disease risk with reasonable accuracy
* Provide quick results based on user input
* Help users understand their health condition
Expected accuracy: **70%–90%** (depending on dataset size and quality)
* Educational purposes for learning ML in healthcare
* Can be extended into mobile/web apps
* Limited features may reduce prediction accuracy
* Overfitting may occur in small datasets
* Improve accuracy using advanced algorithms (Random Forest
* Build a GUI or mobile application
* Integrate with real-time health monitoring devices

The Disease Prediction System demonstrates how machine learning can be applied in healthcare to assist in early detection of diseases. It highlights the importance of data-driven decision-making and provides a foundation for building more advanced healthcare applications. This project helps in understanding classification algorithms and their real-world impact.
